title: Take a Rest
description: Ever want to heal by crouching and standing still? Take a rest and you will start to regenerate health.
body:
Want a way to heal your character in down time? With Take a Rest you can do that.

After crouching and standing still for a little while you will start resting. While resting you gain regeneration until you take damage or move again.

Supports mc versions 1.20.1 through 26.1.2

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tBEXRVWeeJ8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Config**


Change time delay until resting (in ticks):

/scoreboard players set tar.settings tar.heal.delay 160

Take hunger while resting:
/scoreboard players set TARest.Config TakeHunger 1

Turn off resting particles:
/scoreboard players set TARest.Config RemoveParticles 1
